final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [4:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 5'b00001; // Initialize to state 1
    end else begin
        count <= {count[3:0], count[4]}; // Shift operation for ring counter
    end
end

endmodule
